# go-term benchmark baseline
# go test -bench=. -count=10 -benchmem ./term
# Each line: Name  NsPerOp  BytesPerOp  AllocsPerOp
BenchmarkVisualReorder_FullRow 17753 22552 69
BenchmarkVisualReorder_AllLTR 579 0 0
BenchmarkSixel_Decode 24451 49344 5
BenchmarkGrid_InsertLines 1186 0 0
BenchmarkGrid_DeleteLines 1205 0 0
BenchmarkResize_Reflow_DeepScrollback 37064970 90451219 31155
BenchmarkGrid_ScrollUpRegion_FullScreen 2273 0 0
BenchmarkGrid_ScrollDownRegion_FullScreen 2296 0 0
BenchmarkGrid_Search 82058 0 0
BenchmarkGrid_Search_LargeScrollback 12185 24 1
BenchmarkParserFeed_PlainText 79047 0 0
BenchmarkParserFeed_SGR 41224 0 0
BenchmarkScrollback_EnsureGeom 417538 2893313 4
BenchmarkForegroundPass 61283 0 0
